name: Mineshaft
short_description: Use falling blocks to craft shovels, pickaxes, bombs and other tools to dig deeper into the mine and uncover gems to complete your quest! Craft coins to buy upgrades to tools and special abilities! Join a friend for classic PVP puzzle battles, where combos drop trash onto your opponent's playfield!
detailed_description: A very tough (but fair!) falling blocks game where you must craft shovels, pickaxes, bombs and other tools to dig your way deeper into the mine and uncover gems to complete your quest! Craft coins to buy upgrades to your tools and special abilities! Quest across a map of different locations where the crafting resources change based on the environment (grasslands, desert, mountains, etc.) Have a friend join for classic PVP puzzle battles, where combos drop trash onto your opponent's playfield!
about_the_game: A very tough (but fair!) falling blocks game where you must craft shovels, pickaxes, bombs and other tools to dig your way deeper into the mine and uncover gems to complete your quest!
